name.title: Name
name.description: Display name for the TV accessory in Apple Home.

host.title: MQTT Broker Host
host.description: IP address or hostname of your MQTT broker (e.g. Mosquitto). This is NOT the hub IP — it is the broker the hub connects to.

mac.title: Hub MAC Address
mac.description: MAC address of your Sofabaton X2 hub (e.g. AABBCCDDEEFF). Used to build MQTT topic names. Find it in your router's device list or the Sofabaton app.

username.title: MQTT Username
username.description: Optional. Username for your MQTT broker if authentication is enabled.

password.title: MQTT Password
password.description: Optional. Password for your MQTT broker if authentication is enabled.

mainActivity.title: Main Activity
mainActivity.description: Activity to launch when you tap the power button in Apple Home. Must match an activity name exactly as shown in the Sofabaton app.
